response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified Shirakami Fubuki performing her original song 'Say! Fanfare!' at 01:40. 2. Performed a Google search with the query '"Say!ファンファーレ!" Shirakami Fubuki Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. 3. Used the search results (specifically Genius and Hololive Wiki) to extract the song lyrics for the original and English versions. 4. Mapped the video structure into three scenes: Intro/dialogue, song performance, and outro. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the gathered metadata and lyrics.
response.global_summary: A short video featuring an intro dialogue from VTuber Shirakami Fubuki, followed by a live performance of her original song "Say! Fanfare!" at her 1st solo live, with closing graphic elements.

scenes.description: Intro segment featuring Shirakami Fubuki talking directly to the audience.
Transition animation showing a book being opened, followed by a title card screen for 'FBKINGDOM ANTHEM'.
Live performance of 'Say! Fanfare!' by Shirakami Fubuki on stage.
